name: supplylens: 02 Discover

parameters.jsCode:
const inp = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { direct_company: inp.company || null } }];

parameters.query: UPDATE expand_queue SET status='in_progress', started_at=NOW() WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM expand_queue WHERE status='queued' AND ($1::text IS NULL OR company_name=$1) AND tier <= $2::int ORDER BY tier ASC, created_at ASC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED) RETURNING id, company_name, country, tier
INSERT INTO claims (subject, predicate, object, confidence, raw_text, source_url, tier, validation_status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::float, $5, $6, $7::int, 'pending') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
UPDATE expand_queue SET status='done' WHERE id=$1

notes:
Pipeline 02: Discover
- Polls expand_queue for queued companies
- Runs 3 SearXNG searches per company
- Fetches top 6 pages via Browserless
- Gemini Flash extracts supply chain claims
- Inserts raw claims into PostgreSQL
- Triggers 03-challenge
